user_system_path: Lock the design system (docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md — DONE this PR) then FULLY overhaul the landing to it: $500M / Linear-Vercel-Notion tier, matching the owner's AI Studio reference build. Lead with a realistic product mockup; real official brand logos (not flat hand-drawn); locked color/type/spacing tokens; smooth motion; flawless on desktop AND mobile. Not a micro-polish pass — an obvious, full leap. Port from existing good material (AI Studio / Figma / Lovable) rather than reinventing.
allowed_files_raw: design system doc + landing/nav components + globals.css/tailwind tokens + public logo assets + e2e specs + control-plane files
forbidden_files_raw: No backend, schema, API, or dependency changes. If the overhaul needs a dep (e.g. a brand-logo set), name it for a scoped exception.
required_local_proof: npm run build && npm run lint && npx vitest run tests/config/__tests__/large-file-splits.test.ts && npx playwright test tests/e2e/public-routes.spec.ts tests/e2e/landing-hero-visual-qa.spec.ts tests/e2e/dashboard-navigation.spec.ts tests/e2e/authenticated-routes.spec.ts
required_browser_proof: Landing meets docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md §12 quality checklist; flawless at 1440 and 390; real logos; realistic product mockup; smooth motion; no horizontal overflow.
browser_proof_command: playwright public-routes + landing-hero-visual-qa; screenshots at 1440 and 390
acceptance_condition: Landing is overhauled to docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md (the $500M bar, §12 checklist all pass), obviously better than the prior pass; every data-testid/heading/copy/href preserved OR e2e specs updated in the same PR; full UI proof gate green.
anti_regression_checks: real official logos, consistent icon set
no horizontal overflow at 375/390; great at 1440 and 390
stop_condition: Stop when issue #378 has a merged PR whose landing meets docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md and the full UI proof gate is green.
next_command: New session: read docs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md + the owner's AI Studio reference, then fully overhaul components/foldera/LandingPage.tsx (+ tokens in app/globals.css / tailwind.config.js, + public/logos) to the bar. Show desktop + mobile screenshots before shipping.
